Multi-Suite Allocation Policy. Organisations may select more than one suite to maximise their pavilion presence. Combining adjacent booths creates a unified, high-impact branded zone. Zones A–D are colour-coded by sector. All suites marked Available are open for immediate booking. Contact the Exhibitions Secretariat: exhibitions@wisabuja2026.gov.ng
